summary: Comprehensive testing of Sundays Cookie Website - Major iteration 3 with UPI payment flow, cookie detail modal, bestseller badge, active navbar section highlighting, animated cart counter, and back-to-top button. All backend APIs (12 tests) and frontend features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created via pytest with TEST_ prefix and payment fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full e2e testing completed for iteration 3. All new features verified: (1) UPI Payment Flow - 2-step checkout with QR code, UPI ID copy, Open UPI App button, transaction ID input, back button preserves form data; (2) Cookie Detail Modal - opens on image click with larger image, full description, price, qty selector, add-to-cart; (3) Bestseller Badge - shows on The Lazy Legend only; (4) Active Section Highlighting - navbar buttons turn gold when section is visible; (5) Animated Cart Counter - badge animates when items added; (6) Back-to-Top Button - appears after scrolling 800px. Backend: GET /api/config returns upi_id, POST /api/orders saves payment_reference and payment_method fields.

features_tested.hero_section: ✓ Video background, 'Sundays' branding, 'THE 24-HOUR COOKIE' tagline, scroll indicator
features_tested.navbar: ✓ Process, Menu, Instagram, Cart buttons with active section highlighting (gold underline)
features_tested.active_section_highlighting: ✓ MENU turns gold when shop visible, PROCESS turns gold when process visible
features_tested.cart_badge_animation: ✓ Badge animates when items added to cart
features_tested.bestseller_badge: ✓ Shows on The Lazy Legend card only (gold badge with star)
features_tested.cookie_detail_modal: ✓ Opens on image click, shows larger image, full description, price, qty selector, add-to-cart button
features_tested.always_available_section: ✓ The Lazy Legend (₹89) with qty selector, Little Rebels (₹219/pack) without qty selector
features_tested.exclusive_flavours_section: ✓ All 5 cookies (Dark Side ₹99, After Hours ₹89, Golden Affair ₹109, Midnight Meltdown ₹109, Nutella Lava ₹109)
features_tested.quantity_selector: ✓ 1,2,4,6 options on all cookies EXCEPT Little Rebels (minis)
features_tested.add_to_cart: ✓ Works with toast notification (dark theme, top-right)
features_tested.cart_panel: ✓ Sheet component, shows items with qty controls, remove buttons, correct totals
features_tested.assorted_builder: ✓ Shows 6 regular flavors, +/- buttons, 6/6 counter, ₹649 price, button enabled only when 6 selected
features_tested.order_form_step1: ✓ Name, phone (+91 prefix), address, notes fields with validation
features_tested.order_form_validation: ✓ Shows errors for missing required fields, validates 10-digit Indian phone (6-9 start)
features_tested.order_form_step_indicator: ✓ Shows '1 DETAILS → 2 PAYMENT' with checkmark on completion
features_tested.order_form_step2_upi: ✓ Amount display, QR code, UPI ID with copy button, Open UPI App link, transaction ID input
features_tested.back_button_preserves_data: ✓ Form data preserved when going back from Step 2 to Step 1
features_tested.order_success_overlay: ✓ Shows order ID, total, 'paid via UPI' badge, Continue Browsing button
features_tested.promo_section: ✓ 'FIRST-TIME OFFER' badge, 'Tag us. Get 10% off your next order.', @sundays.hyd link
features_tested.footer: ✓ Sun/days. branding, Instagram @sundays.hyd link, 'DELIVERY ONLY' section, copyright 2025
features_tested.backend_get_config: ✓ Returns upi_id: sundays@upi, business_name: Sundays, whatsapp
features_tested.backend_post_orders: ✓ Creates orders with payment_reference, payment_method, payment_status fields
features_tested.backend_get_orders: ✓ Returns saved orders with phone filter support
